  • Classes in view used by controller

    Description
    ExpenseTrackerView
    Provides a visualization of a list of transactions along with the ability to add/remove transactions.

    Description
    AnalysisPanelView
    The AnalsisPanelView class supports performing data analysis on the model and displaying the data analysis results to the user.
